title: ToolRiskRecord
description: Risk assessment of a tool available to agents. Produced by a tool policy evaluator, consumed by the agent runtime and verification gates. Phase 0-5 bootstraps strict read-mostly policy; forbidden patterns include MCP config modification, UI-TARS/computer-use, and package managers (npm/pip/yarn).

phase_policy.description: Phase range where this policy applies, e.g. 'Phase 0-5'. Must specify applicable phase range.

classification.description: Current classification of the tool under this phase policy.

rationale.description: Why this classification was chosen. Must be non-empty.

conditions.description: Conditions under which the classification could change.

review_date.description: ISO8601 date when this tool should be re-evaluated.

examples.rationale: Skill installation is deferred to Phase 6+ Source Lock & Quarantine.
